hero.tagline: For those who never settled - this is the reward.

intro.headline: Premium residences designed for a life that has outgrown the ordinary.
intro.body: Welcome to the extraordinary everyday. Golden Luxuria brings together sweeping architecture, premium interiors, and resort-style amenities - for those who believe every day should feel like one worth remembering.

amenities.headline: Resort-style Amenities
amenities.body: From quiet zen gardens to a private banquet hall, every shared space is engineered to make daily life feel a little more thoughtful.

plans.label: 2 BHK
features: Two comfortable, cross-ventilated bedrooms.
Living room opening onto the central passage.
Kitchen with an attached wash area.
Foyer, store and two bathrooms.

plans.label: 3 BHK
features: Three bedrooms, including two spacious masters.
Large living room with a wide central passage.
Kitchen with an attached wash area.
Store room plus attached and common bathrooms.

specifications.headline: Specifications
specifications.body: Every detail, orchestrated for a life of balance and beauty.

items.title: Structure
items.body: R.C.C. frame structure. Roda waterproofing with china mosaic on the terrace.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: Rustic-texture and acrylic paint on the building exterior; putty finish in interior flats. 32x32 or 24x48 vitrified tile flooring with skirting, and kota stone in the wash area. Ceramic tile flooring with attractive glazed tiles in bathrooms. Granite kitchen platform with stainless-steel sink and full-height decorative tile dado.

items.title: Plumbing & Electrical
items.body: Concealed ISI, CPVC & UPVC plumbing with bathroom fittings and sanitary fittings. ISI-standard concealed electrical wiring - light, fan, TV, bell and bedroom AC points, plus a washing-machine point in the wash area.

items.title: Windows & Doors
items.body: Decorative main door with sal-wood frame; all internal door frames in granite. Anodized / Akzonobel heavy aluminium-section windows with granite jamb and heat-reflective, noise-reduction glass.

gallery.headline: Gallery
gallery.body: A look at what awaits you.

location.headline: Location
location.body: Strategically located for connectivity and convenience in Bharuch.

landmarks.name: THE i-SCHOOL by eduMETA, Juna Tavra

items.title: Zero Out
items.body: Designed to drop your monthly energy and water bills to near zero through passive design choices.

items.title: Smart Power
items.body: Solar generation paired with energy-efficient fixtures keep the lights on without the spike.

items.title: Zero Waste
items.body: Rainwater harvesting and on-site treatment loop water back into landscaping and amenities.

items.title: Climate Capsule
items.body: Cross-ventilation, shaded glazing, and high-mass walls hold temperature without heavy AC use.

walkthrough.headline: Walkthrough
walkthrough.body: Every detail, orchestrated for a life of balance and beauty.

hero.tagline: Built for the family that earned this moment.

intro.headline: Where modern living meets the warmth every home should carry.
intro.body: Welcome to Golden Heaven. A community that rises above the ordinary - where purposeful layouts meet lush open grounds and every amenity is a reason to come home.

amenities.headline: Everyday Amenities
amenities.body: Spaces that turn a building into a community.

plans.label: 3 BHK
features: Three well-proportioned bedrooms, two of them spacious masters.
Expansive living and dining hall opening onto a private deck.
Large kitchen with a connected utility and wash area.
Three bathrooms - attached, secondary and common.

plans.label: 4 BHK
features: Four generously sized bedrooms for a large family.
Grand living room with an attached deck and a separate formal dining.
Spacious kitchen with adjoining store, puja and wash areas.
Bedrooms with dressing-toilets, plus common and powder bathrooms.

items.title: Structure
items.body: RCC framed earthquake-resistant structure designed for seismic loads. High-quality brickwork for internal and external walls.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: Modern aesthetic with sand-face plaster exterior. Internal walls finished with smooth putty. Premium vitrified tile flooring.

items.title: Plumbing & Electrical
items.body: Concealed plumbing with branded CP fittings. Concealed copper wiring with modular switches and MCB protection.

items.title: Windows & Doors
items.body: Anodized aluminium sliding windows with safety grills. Decorative main door with wooden frame and flush doors for internals.

hero.tagline: A well-designed home at a price that makes sense.

intro.headline: Straightforward, solid, and built for families that value quality in every square foot.
intro.body: A home that earns its place in your life. Golden Residency is built on the belief that great homes shouldn't ask you to compromise - clean layouts, solid construction, and a well-connected address for families investing in today.

amenities.headline: Everyday Amenities
amenities.body: All the essentials for value-led modern living.

groups.label: 2 BHK (Wings A, B, C, D, G, H)

plans.label: 2 BHK
features: Two-bedroom layout repeated across Wings A, B, C, D, G and H.
Living and kitchen-dining open off a central lift-and-stair core.
Both bedrooms served by attached toilets and an architectural projection balcony.

plans.label: 1 BHK
features: Compact one-bedroom layout in Wings E and F.
Living, kitchen and bedroom arranged around the lift-and-stair core.
Attached and common toilets with a utility wash area.

items.title: Structure
items.body: R.C.C. frame structure. Terrace finished with roda waterproofing and china mosaic.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: 32x32 or 24x48 vitrified tile flooring with skirting, and kota stone in wash areas. Granite kitchen platform with stainless-steel sink and full-height decorative tile dado. Ceramic-tiled bathrooms with glazed wall tiles. Acrylic exterior paint and a putty finish in interiors.

items.title: Plumbing & Electrical
items.body: ISI concealed electrical wiring with light, fan, TV, bell and AC (bedroom) points, plus a washing-machine point in the wash area. ISI CPVC & UPVC plumbing with bathroom and sanitary fittings.

items.title: Windows & Doors
items.body: Powder-coated aluminium section windows. Decorative main door with a sal-wood frame; all inner door frames in granite.

hero.tagline: The new standard for business in the port city.

intro.headline: Most stylish commercial project designed for those who won't settle for less than the best.
intro.body: Where business meets luxury. Designed by India's famous architect Sanjay Joshi, Golden Square Bharuch is a landmark structure offering massive 102 Offices and 150 Shops with world-class facilities.

amenities.headline: Building Amenities
amenities.body: From triple-height atrium to dedicated cinema and food court - designed for footfall.

plans.label: Basement Parking
features: Dedicated basement parking layout with ramp access and circulation aisles.

plans.label: Ground Floor
features: State-of-the-art structure with triple-height atrium.
Dedicated floors for retail, food court, and multiplex.

plans.label: First Floor
features: High-speed elevators and wide corridors for smooth traffic flow.

plans.label: Second Floor
features: Continuous retail concourse linked by the central atrium.

plans.label: Third Floor
features: Retail units arranged around dual passages with an open terrace.

plans.label: Office Floors
features: Premium location with massive visibility and frontage.
Modular floor plates suit corporate and boutique tenants.

items.body: Earthquake-resistant RCC frame structure with modern architectural facade.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: Designer atrium with skylight, premium vitrified tiles in all common areas, and high-quality exterior finish.

hero.tagline: A township built around everything that matters.

intro.headline: Where tower homes and private bungalows share a community worth coming home to.
intro.body: Find your pace. Find your place. Golden Nirvana is a full-scale township where verdant parks stretch between streetscapes and every corner is planned to bring peace to your daily life.

amenities.headline: Township Amenities
amenities.body: Open parks, walking loops, and recreational pockets - all woven into the daily route.

plans.label: 2 BHK (Blocks A-E)
features: Typical layout repeated on the 2nd to 7th floors of Blocks A-E.
Two equally sized bedrooms, including a master.
Combined kitchen and dining with a connected wash area.
Living room opening to the central passage and twin lifts.

plans.label: Ground Floor
features: Living, kitchen and one bedroom on the ground floor.
Private covered parking with otta, garden and dry/wash areas.

plans.label: First Floor
features: Bedrooms including a master suite arranged around a central passage.
Attached and common toilets with a standing balcony.

Ceramic tile flooring with attractive glazed tiles in bathrooms. Granite kitchen platform with stainless-steel sink and lintel-level tile dado.

hero.tagline: Three floors of space, one address you will always be proud of.

intro.headline: Premium row villas where your family has room to live, grow, and thrive.
intro.body: Built wide. Built free. Golden Villa is a carefully planned row villa community with individual plots, landscaped common areas, and space that turns a neighbourhood into a home your family is proud of.

items.caption: 4 BHK bungalows with an on-site shopping arcade

amenities.headline: Community Amenities
amenities.body: Designed for owners who value space and privacy.

plans.label: 4 BHK Row Villa - Ground
features: Open-plan living and dining flowing into a kitchen with a utility wash area.
Covered car parking and a front otta framing the entrance.

plans.label: 4 BHK Row Villa - First
features: Two bedrooms including a master suite, each with an attached toilet.
Standing balcony and a central passage linking the rooms.

plans.label: 4 BHK Row Villa - Second
features: Private master suite opening to a generous open terrace and deck.
Standing balcony extending the upper living space outdoors.

items.title: Structure
items.body: RCC framed earthquake-resistant structure with multi-level load design. High-quality brickwork for all external and partition walls.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: Striking modern elevation with exposed brick-texture finishes. Premium vitrified tiles and granite stairs with SS railings.

items.title: Plumbing & Electrical
items.body: Designer CP and sanitary fittings. Concealed wiring with premium modular switches and points for high-end appliances.

items.title: Windows & Doors

hero.tagline: Independent living, the way it was always meant to be.

intro.headline: Row villas for families who want their own ground, their own gate, and their own story.
intro.body: Built for those who choose ground over sky. Golden Homes is a community of independent bungalows - each plot a private world, each street a shared sense of belonging.

items.caption: Private garden & dedicated parking per home

amenities.headline: Community Amenities
amenities.body: Quiet streets, generous green pockets, and space to make your own.

plans.label: 3 BHK Villa - Ground
features: Independent Row-Villa lifestyle with dedicated ground-level entry.
Ground floor Bedroom (10x10) plus multi-bedroom setups on 1F.
Front Garden area and dedicated 8'9" x 18'0" private parking slot.

plans.label: 3 BHK Villa - First
features: Dedicated First Floor Puja Room for spiritual privacy.
Multi-bedroom configuration with dedicated common toilet.

items.title: Structure
items.body: RCC load-bearing or framed structure designed for independent units. External plaster with sand finish for durability.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: Modern boutique aesthetic with stone-texture or brick-finish facades. Smooth lime/putty finish for interior surfaces.

items.title: Plumbing & Electrical
items.body: Standard brand plumbing fixtures. Recessed electrical wiring with focus on safety and aesthetic modularity.

items.title: Windows & Doors
items.body: Z-section or aluminium windows for durability. Solid wood or flush doors with standard hardware sets.

intro.headline: A private bungalow community where space, greenery and good neighbours come as standard.
intro.body: Open land. Private life. Golden Palm Villa offers families the rare combination of bungalow ownership, curated landscaping, and a clubhouse community - where your home has room to breathe.

amenities.headline: Community Amenities
amenities.body: Curated grounds, a clubhouse, and quiet streets to call your own.

plans.label: Ground Floor
features: Drawing room, kitchen and one bedroom with bath.
Private covered parking, otta and a garden.
plans.note: Detailed floor plan drawings available on request.

plans.label: First Floor
features: Two more bedrooms, a lounge and a children's room with two toilets.
Private balcony and an open terrace.

items.title: Structure
items.body: RCC frame structure.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: 24x24 vitrified tiles with skirting. Decorative main door with sal wood and inner door frames in flush door. Powder-coated aluminium section windows with marble seal. Marble stairs with decorative CRC pipe railing.

items.title: Plumbing & Services
items.body: Black granite platform with stainless steel sink and full-height decorative glaze tiles. Concealed ISI, CPVC & UPVC plumbing with bathroom fittings. R.O. plant and individual PVC water tanks for each bungalow.

items.body: ISI standard concealed electric wiring with modular boards.

intro.headline: Situated in the heart of the city for maximum business visibility.

features: 186 shops in the commercial hub of Ankleshwar.
136 of the 186 shops are centrally air-conditioned.
Designed for banks, retail showrooms, and medical suites.

24/7 security with CCTV and fire safety systems.

intro.body: Maximum Light. Maximum Impact. Located in the heart of Ankleshwar, Golden Palm Plaza offers 100 Shops and Offices across 5 floors. The building is designed specifically to ensure every unit gets noticed.

features: Strategic location ensures no shop or office goes unnoticed.
Perfect for showrooms, banks, corporate offices, and supermarkets.
Wide parking space for visitors and stakeholders.

hero.tagline: The strategic gateway for Surat's industrial growth.

intro.headline: Massive scale, perfect connectivity, and all-inclusive infrastructure.
intro.body: Industrial Excellence at Delad. Spanning across a strategic location connected to NH 48, this estate provides 468 plots designed for efficiency and growth. With full infrastructure from gas lines to RCC roads.

features: Connected by main road leading directly to National Highway 48.
N.A. passing completed with all legal approvals.
Full utility support: electricity point, gas line, and drainage.
Attractive entry gate with compound wall for security.

items.body: Heavy-duty RCC roads designed for industrial transport.

items.title: Utilities
items.body: Individual electricity and gas connection points provided for each plot.
